headlines: Bouw je stack. Steen voor steen.

descriptions: Handgemaakt in Nederland. Gratis verzending vanaf €50.

images.description: The image has a light beige background and displays the text "STONEY bracelets" at the top, followed by "MIX & MATCH" in large multicolored block letters with varied background patches, and the subtext "Our bestselling bracelets." Six stacked sets of beaded bracelets are arranged in two columns of three, labeled 1, 2, 3 on the left and A, B, C on the right, with crossing lines connecting them to suggest pairing combinations; each bracelet stack contains multiple strands of round beads in colors including brown/gold tiger-eye tones, grey, blue, and black, with small square metal charms engraved with "SB." At the bottom, a black bar displays five stars and the text "Rated 4.6 / 5," alongside a white section with a shopping cart icon and the text "Shop the Deal."

The image shows six stacks of beaded bracelets arranged in two columns of three rows each on a light beige background, with crossing lines connecting the left stacks (labeled 1, 2, 3) to the right stacks (labeled A, B, C). Each bracelet stack consists of three individual stretch bracelets featuring round beads in varying colors — including brown/amber tiger-eye tones, blue/grey tones, and mixed grey/rust tones — with small square metal charms engraved with "SB." Visible text includes "STONEY bracelets" at the top, large stylized lettering reading "MIX & MATCH" in multicolored cutout-style typography, "Our bestselling bracelets" in a serif font, and at the bottom a black bar displaying five stars, "Rated 4.6 / 5," a shopping cart icon, and "Shop the Deal."
